sentences.arabic: جَلَسَ الأَصْدِقَاءُ فِي المَقْهَى وَطَلَبُوا المَشْرُوبَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Prijatelji su sjeli u kafeu i naručili pića.
sentences.translationEn: The friends sat in the café and ordered drinks.

sentences.arabic: طَلَبَ أَحْمَدُ قَهْوَةً وَطَلَبَتْ سَارَةُ عَصِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Ahmed je naručio kafu, a Sara je naručila sok.
sentences.translationEn: Ahmed ordered coffee and Sara ordered juice.

sentences.translation: Razgovarali su o poslu i svakodnevnom životu.
sentences.translationEn: They talked about their work and daily lives.
They spent a nice time together.

sentences.translation: Ahmed je platio račun i otišli su.
sentences.translationEn: Ahmed paid the bill and they left.
